zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Stapleton於大約1423年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親John Stapleton59歲，母親Stapleton25歲。她於1441年與Robert Cressett在英國史洛普爾希普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1500年在英國享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Stapleton was born about 1423, in Devon, England, her father, John Stapleton, was 59 and her mother, Stapleton, was 25. She married Robert Cressett in 1441, in Shipton, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1500, in England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Stapleton est née environ 1423, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Stapleton, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Stapleton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cressett en 1441, à Shipton, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1500, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Stapletonが約1423年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Stapletonは59歳，母Stapletonは25歳であった。1441年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュイプトンでRobert Cressettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1500年にイギリスで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Stapleton(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stapleton(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Stapleton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1441년 영국 슈럽실르 시프턴에서 Robert Cressett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stapleton, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Stapleton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cressett em 1441, em Shipton, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1500, em Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Stapleton родилась около 1423 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Stapleton было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Stapleton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cressett в 1441 г. в местности шиптон, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1500 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 79 лет.
